principle: E(Rp) = Σ W_i * R_i
notes: Explicit expected-return formula and numeric example in module 9

principle: Portfolio variance = Σ_i(W_i^2 σ_i^2) + 2 Σ_{i<j}(W_i W_j ρ_{ij} σ_i σ_j)
notes: Explicit variance–covariance formula with explanation

principle: Portfolio standard deviation = sqrt(Portfolio variance)
notes: Present in module 9

principle: Covariance = ρ_{ij} × σ_i × σ_j
notes: Explicit in correlation / covariance section

principle: Correlation coefficient (ρ) ∈ [-1, +1] interpretation
notes: Concept present; converting to numeric policy left to config

principle: Value at Risk (VaR): empirical percentile method (95% example)

principle: Expected Shortfall (average loss beyond VaR)

principle: Sharpe Ratio = (R_portfolio - R_riskfree) / σ_portfolio
notes: Present in module 9

principle: Position sizing (example formula): Position_Sizing = Risk_Capital / (Stop_Loss_Distance * Contract_Size)
notes: Explicit example formula in module 9

principle: Position sizing guideline: risk no more than 1-2% of capital per trade (example)

principle: Kelly percentage: Kelly% = W - [(1-W)/R]
notes: Present in module 9 but marked LATER / simulation-only per mapping rules
